response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development across various domains, including embedded systems (C/C++), but lacks direct experience with Linux kernel modification, embedded networking security features (e.g., MACsec, IEEE 802.1X), or LAN-switch product development. Their proficiency in C is demonstrated, but the resume does not highlight security-specific or networking expertise required for this role. Additionally, there is no mention of Japanese language proficiency or experience with chip-vendor SDKs.
strengths: Strong background in C/C++ for embedded systems (e.g., National Instruments, robotics arms)
Broad software development experience across multiple languages and domains (TypeScript, Node.js, D, Java, etc.)
Experience with system-level programming and hardware interaction (e.g., robotic arms, Apple TV/iOS apps)
concerns: No explicit experience with Linux kernel modification or embedded networking security features (MACsec, 802.1X, etc.)
No mention of Japanese language proficiency or experience with chip-vendor SDKs
Lacks direct experience with LAN-switch products or related networking technologies (NETCONF, SNMP, etc.)
